User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account for the CodeHub application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. Should match the Firebase Auth UID.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

company.description: The company the user works for.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Repository.title: Repository
Repository.description: Represents a code repository within the CodeHub application.

description.description: A brief description of the repository.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns the repository. Should match the Firebase Auth UID.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the repository was created.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public and private user profile information, including name, bio, and company. The document ID must match the user's Firebase Auth UID, enforcing ownership.

/users/{userId}/repositories/{repoId}.description: Stores repositories created by a specific user. Path-based ownership ensures a user can only access their own repositories.
